# managed-agent-control-mcp

> An MCP server that exposes the Claude Managed Agents API as tools, so a user in
> Claude.ai (or any MCP client) can start, observe, and interact with managed
> agents running on Anthropic's platform. Python + FastMCP. Runs over stdio, a
> generic HTTP container, or AWS Lambda. Pluggable inbound auth: static bearer,
> generic OIDC (JWT), or an AWS Cognito preset. Single operator ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
> (outbound). Community project; not affiliated with Anthropic.

## Concepts

- Two auth layers: OUTBOUND (this server → Anthropic, via ANTHROPIC_API_KEY) and
  INBOUND (MCP client → this server, via bearer/OIDC/Cognito; HTTP only).
- Observation is by POLLING (session_get + session_events with a `since` cursor;
  page-token pagination via next_page) — MCP tool calls are request/response; there
  is no live stream.
- Read-only control plane: agent/environment definitions are managed by the
  separate Terraform provider; this server reads them and operates sessions.

## Tools

- Discover: agent_list, agent_get, environment_list, environment_get
- Start: session_start(agent_id, environment_id, message?, vault_ids?, agent_version?)
- Observe: session_get, session_list, session_events(types?, since?, limit?, page?)
- Interact: session_message, session_interrupt, session_respond(tool_use_id, result)
- Destructive (gated by MCP_ALLOW_DESTRUCTIVE): session_archive, session_delete

## Docs

- README: ./README.md
- Configuration (env vars + guardrails): ./docs/configuration.md
- Authentication (bearer/OIDC/Cognito + Claude.ai): ./docs/authentication.md
- Deployment (local/container/Lambda): ./docs/deployment.md
- Architecture (modules, auth layers, polling model): ./docs/architecture.md
- Tools (full reference): ./docs/tools.md

## Upstream

- Managed Agents API: https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/managed-agents
- Beta header: managed-agents-2026-04-01
